home.subtitle: No reading is final. Faith is conjugated in the plural.
home.manifesto_text: God is not opposed to LGBT people. This rejection is the product of historical and human interpretations of sacred texts.
home.pillar1_text: The great monotheistic religions are based on love, compassion and justice. No explicit condemnation of homosexuality was made by Jesus, who preached inclusion.
home.pillar2_text: Passages used against LGBT people must be understood in their historical context: rituals, social norms, ancient codes.
home.pillar3_text: Religious readings have been influenced by cultural norms: patriarchy, heterocentrism, power.
home.pillar4_text: Many inclusive religious communities exist today across the world.
home.join_text: Download the poster, take a photo with it in front of a place of worship, and share with #GodLovesDiversity.

footer.tagline: God is love. Faith is plural.

participate.title: Share your light
participate.subtitle: Take a photo of yourself in front of a place of worship with the poster, and join the global movement.
participate.drop_label: Drop your photo here or click to browse
participate.success_text: Your photo has been sent. It will be published after a quick review.
participate.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

gallery.title: Global gallery
gallery.subtitle: Every photo is a testimony. Every testimony is a step.
gallery.empty: No photo for these filters yet.

posters.title: Download the posters
posters.subtitle: Print. Stick. Photograph. Share.
posters.tip1: Place the poster in public space or hold it in front of a place of worship.
posters.tip2: Take a photo and share it with #GodLovesDiversity.
posters.tip3: Upload it here directly to join the global gallery.

newsletter.success: Check your inbox to confirm your subscription.

about.title: About
about.intro: God Loves Diversity is a citizen, interfaith, international movement to reconcile faith and diversity.
